atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports foot pain following a soccer injury.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports pain in his left foot following a soccer injury yesterday.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports twisting his body around another player.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports a sudden pain in his foot.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports no prior injuries to this foot.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports elevating the foot.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports icing the foot.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports taking ibuprofen.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient rates his pain as a 3 without ibuprofen.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient rates his pain as a 7-8 with ibuprofen.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports playing soccer since he was approximately five years old.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports no numbness or tingling sensation in the foot.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical examination reveals bruising on the left foot.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical examination reveals swelling on the left foot.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient has a Lisfranc fracture with ligamentous injury to the foot.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: I am recommending surgery to place the bones back in their proper position.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: I am recommending the use of plates and screws to hold the bones there while they heal.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: This is a day surgery.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient will be able to go home the same day.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: You will be in a cast.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: You will need to use crutches for approximately six to eight weeks.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: After that, you will gradually start walking on your foot based on how you tolerate it.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: We will see how you do at that point.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: I will see you on Monday morning to get your foot taken care of.
